_comment: POLI-11 Lighthouse CI extension — Phase 24 Plan 05. URL list is research-corrected: /, /activity, /skills (the sessions-compare route was excluded — that route requires demo session-id seeding per RESEARCH Pitfall 5; without seeding LCP measures the empty-state and produces noise). /skills is chart-heavy and requires no search params, making it the right perf-budget proxy. Operator-driven, NOT CI-blocking on every commit — run via 'cd frontend && npx lhci autorun' at phase close (plan 07).

assert._comment_inp: INP is excluded from automated assertions: Lighthouse's cold-load audit cannot synthesize user interactions, so the 'auditRan' precondition always fails (verified Phase 24 Plan 07). The POLI-11 binary perf gate (React DevTools profiler verifying 0 commits below DensityToggle on tier swap) covers the interactive-paint contract operator-side. If a future phase needs CI-gated INP, switch to lighthouse-user-flows (https://github.com/GoogleChrome/lighthouse-user-flows) or Playwright-driven web-vitals capture.
